images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol‑style model, flawless yet realistic skin with subtle pores and delicate vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, fit and curvy silhouette (slim waist, ample bust), straight black silky hair falling softly over her shoulders, captured on the gleaming deck of a luxury yacht at blue‑hour, the scene bathed in warm golden light that is bright and clear with only gentle, soft shadows to maintain a clean, professional look. She wears a form‑fitting, ribbed cashmere high‑neck turtleneck that hugs her curves, the fabric’s subtle sheen highlighting her figure, paired with sleek, minimal accessories. Eye‑level composition, the model glances down with a shy smile, a candid, intimate moment that feels both melancholic and deeply captivating. The background is gently blurred (bokeh) to keep focus on her, with the distant sea and fading sky rendered in soft, warm tones. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, leveraging shallow depth of field, ray‑tracing, global illumination, and hyper‑realistic lighting for a viral Instagram aesthetic.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑style influencer captured on a rooftop parking lot bathed in warm candle‑light glow, eye‑level with the viewer. She stands barefoot on the smooth concrete, a crisp white Crop‑top exposing a hint of cleavage, the delicate lace of a black bralette subtly visible beneath the sheer fabric. Her vintage high‑waisted denim shorts are cuffed at the thigh, the plaid shirt tied loosely around her waist fluttering slightly in the evening breeze. She bites her lower lip, a shy yet enigmatic smile playing at the corners of her mouth, her expressive, large dark eyes gazing directly into the lens as if sharing a secret with the viewer. The city lights of Tokyo glitter in the bokeh background, while subtle neon‑tinted reflections from a nearby billboard paint soft pink streaks across her porcelain skin. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced lighting and global illumination enhance the intimate, mystery‑laden atmosphere. Color graded with a Fujifilm simulation for a cinematic, soft‑skin finish that highlights youthful allure and seductive restraint.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑style influencer standing on a sun‑dappled forest pathway, captured in an artistic black‑and‑white portrait that merges melancholic depth with playful coy — her straight jet‑black hair catching a soft, even golden‑hour glow, flawless yet realistic skin showing delicate pores and a fine vellus hair sheen, large expressive eyes gazing wistfully at the camera as she sticks her tongue out in a cheeky, flirtatious tease. She wears a form‑fitting, crisp white tee‑shirt that clings to her fit, curvy silhouette, its subtle sheer cotton giving a hint of the lace of a barely‑visible white camisole beneath, paired with high‑waisted straight‑leg denim that silhouettes her hips and slender thighs, the denim slightly frayed at the hem for a relaxed, modern vibe. The scene is bathed in bright, clear golden‑hour light with a shallow depth of field, a creamy bokeh that blurs the moss‑covered path and distant trunks, rendering the background soft while keeping her razor‑sharp. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, employing depth of field simulation, global illumination, and ray‑traced lighting to achieve a crisp, ultra‑realistic feel, the image carries a bleach‑bypass grade that boosts contrast and lowers saturation for a moody, cinematic finish.8k photo, Large breasts
